title: Squirrel Removal in DUMBO, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in DUMBO, Brooklyn. Expert wildlife control for lofts, condos, and historic buildings. Licensed & insured. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: DUMBO's converted warehouses and luxury lofts provide numerous entry points for squirrels seeking shelter in Brooklyn's waterfront neighborhood. Our professional squirrel removal services protect DUMBO homes and businesses from structural damage, contamination, and noise caused by these persistent rodents. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective squirrel extraction and exclusion solutions tailored to DUMBO's unique architectural landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience handling squirrel infestations in DUMBO's historic industrial buildings and modern high-rises. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges of Brooklyn waterfront properties and provide guaranteed solutions with same-day emergency service available throughout the neighborhood.
localContext: DUMBO's proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park and the East River attracts significant squirrel populations that frequently invade the area's converted warehouses, cobblestone buildings, and luxury condominiums. The neighborhood's historic cast-iron structures and exposed brick buildings offer ideal nesting locations, making professional exclusion work essential for property owners between the Manhattan and Brooklyn Bridges.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in DUMBO?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in DUMBO typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the type of building. Historic warehouse conversions may require specialized exclusion techniques that affect pricing. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all DUMBO properties.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in DUMBO buildings?
faqs.answer: DUMBO's older industrial buildings often have gaps in rooflines, exposed utility lines, and architectural features that provide easy access for squirrels. The neighborhood's proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park and mature trees along the waterfront creates an ideal habitat, while the abundance of converted lofts with attics and crawl spaces offers perfect nesting spots.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my DUMBO loft?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removals in DUMBO are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the complexity of the infestation. We offer same-day emergency service for urgent situations and can typically perform an initial inspection within 24 hours. Our process includes humane trapping, complete exclusion, and sanitation services.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for squirrel removal in DUMBO?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion work performed in DUMBO. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return at no additional charge. Our guarantee covers both the removal process and all entry point repairs, giving DUMBO property owners complete peace of mind.
